_comment: SeaweedFS S3 IAM config for local development. Two identities: learn-api-rw has full access on both buckets; tusd-upload can only write/list/head objects under learn-uploads/. The keys here MUST match the docker-compose defaults so the out-of-the-box local stack works with no extra substitution step. When we tackle deploy, this file gets rendered with real credentials sourced from whatever secrets store we pick then.
